title: Cryptool official launch: platform and referral program live
content_html:
Cryptool is officially launched. The platform is open at app.cryptool.io.

What is live today:

  • Account creation and onboarding for new users
  • Referral program with revenue share for every successful referral
  • Portfolio and investment tooling for individual investors and fund managers

For anyone who joined the early supporter list, register on the platform with the same email you used before and your account will be upgraded automatically.

This is the start of the public Cryptool platform. Thank you to everyone who helped get us here.
author: Cryptool
